---
title: "chen.ist"
title-block-style: none
description: "chen.ist delivers digital infrastructure, cybersecurity, cloud services, and technology education for modern organizations. Open-source, UNIX, and Apple solutions for SMBs."
page-layout: custom
from: markdown+raw_html
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .hp-hero { min-height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; padding: 4rem 1.5rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: #000; }
        .hp-hero-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: url('/assets/images/stock/server-room-dark.jpg') center/cover; opacity: 0.25; }
        .hp-hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 1; }
        .hp-hero h1 { font-size: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 6rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.05em; line-height: 1.02; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
        .hp-hero h1 .gr { color: #81BD4A; }
        .hp-hero p { font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 2vw, 1.4rem); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); max-width: 520px; margin: 0 auto 3rem; line-height: 1.5; }
        .hp-hero .hp-btn { display: inline-block; padding: 1rem 2.5rem; background: #81BD4A; color: #fff; border-radius: 980px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.05rem; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s; }
        .hp-hero .hp-btn:hover { background: #6BA33A; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; transform: translateY(-2px); }
        .hp-hero .hp-scroll { display: block; margin-top: 3rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); font-size: 0.8rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-decoration: none; }
        .hp-hero .hp-scroll:hover { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); text-decoration: none; }
        .hp-hero .hp-scroll i { display: block; font-size: 1.25rem; margin-top: 0.5rem; animation: hp-bounce 2s infinite; }
        @keyframes hp-bounce { 0%,100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(6px); } }

        .hp-marquee { background: #81BD4A; padding: 0.75rem 0; overflow: hidden; white-space: nowrap; }
        .hp-marquee-inner { display: inline-block; animation: hp-scroll-left 30s linear infinite; }
        .hp-marquee span { display: inline-block; padding: 0 3rem; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; letter-spacing: 0.03em; }
        @keyframes hp-scroll-left { 0% { transform: translateX(0); } 100% { transform: translateX(-50%); } }
        @media (max-width: 767px) {
          .hp-hero { min-height: 80vh; padding: 3rem 1.5rem; }
          .hp-hero h1 { font-size: 2.5rem; }
          .hp-marquee span { padding: 0 1.5rem; font-size: 0.75rem; }
        }
        @media (max-width: 480px) {
          .hp-hero { min-height: 70vh; }
          .hp-hero h1 { font-size: 2rem; }
          .hp-hero p { font-size: 1rem; }
          .hp-btn { padding: 0.85rem 2rem; font-size: 0.95rem; }
        }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO — full-screen dark with background image -->
<div class="hp-hero">
  <div class="hp-hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hp-hero-content">
    <h1>Build.<br><span class="gr">Secure.</span><br>Grow.</h1>
    <p>Digital infrastructure, cybersecurity, and education — built on open-source for organizations that value control.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="hp-btn">Book a free consultation</a>
    <a href="#services" class="hp-scroll">Discover what we do <i class="bi bi-chevron-down"></i></a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- GREEN MARQUEE — scrolling keywords -->
<div class="hp-marquee">
  <div class="hp-marquee-inner">
    <span>NixOS</span><span>OpenBSD</span><span>FreeBSD</span><span>Apple Business</span><span>Nextcloud</span><span>Keycloak</span><span>Blue Team SOC</span><span>NIS2 Compliance</span><span>Threat Hunting</span><span>24/7 Monitoring</span><span>EU Data Sovereignty</span><span>Open Source</span>
    <span>NixOS</span><span>OpenBSD</span><span>FreeBSD</span><span>Apple Business</span><span>Nextcloud</span><span>Keycloak</span><span>Blue Team SOC</span><span>NIS2 Compliance</span><span>Threat Hunting</span><span>24/7 Monitoring</span><span>EU Data Sovereignty</span><span>Open Source</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SERVICES -->
<div class="m-bg" id="services">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>What we do</h2>
    <p class="sub">End-to-end technology services built on transparency and security.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-terminal"></i><h3>Digital Infrastructure</h3><p>Open-source, UNIX, and Apple platforms for SMBs.</p><a href="/digital/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i><h3>Security</h3><p>SOC monitoring, threat hunting, NIS2 compliance.</p><a href="/security/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud"></i><h3>Cloud</h3><p>Migration, DevOps, and multi-cloud infrastructure.</p><a href="/services/cloud/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i><h3>Academy</h3><p>Courses, hackathons, and hands-on training.</p><a href="/academy/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-code-square"></i><h3>Resilience</h3><p>Business continuity and disaster recovery.</p><a href="/services/digital-resilience/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURE 1 -->
<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp" alt="Team working on infrastructure"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Infrastructure you<br>actually own.</h2>
        <p>Nextcloud for files. Matrix for chat. Keycloak for SSO. NixOS for servers. Apple Business for devices. We deploy and manage it all — you keep every config, every credential, every byte of data.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/digital/" class="m-lk">Explore digital infrastructure</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURE 2 -->
<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Security monitoring"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Threats don't sleep.<br>Neither do we.</h2>
        <p>Our Blue Team SOC runs 24/7 with open-source tools you can audit. Real-time detection, proactive hunting, and incident response — for organizations that take security seriously.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/security/" class="m-lk">Explore security services</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURE 3 -->
<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Academy training"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Skills that stick.<br>Not certificates that collect dust.</h2>
        <p>Hackathons, intensive trainings, and multi-week courses in cybersecurity and open-source. Everything we teach, we do. Everything you learn, you apply on Monday morning.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/academy/" class="m-lk">Explore the academy</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS -->
<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">15+</div><div class="m-nl">Years experience</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">100%</div><div class="m-nl">Open-source</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">EU</div><div class="m-nl">Data residency</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">24/7</div><div class="m-nl">Monitoring</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- BLOG -->
<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container" style="max-width: 700px;">
    <h2>Latest</h2>
    <p class="sub"></p>
    <div style="border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);">
      <a href="/blog/apple-business-smb-guide.html" style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; padding: 1.5rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06); text-decoration:none; color:inherit;">
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:600;">Apple Business: What SMBs Need to Know</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.82rem; color:#86868b; margin-top:0.15rem;">March 25, 2026</div>
        </div>
        <span class="m-lk" style="flex-shrink:0; margin-left:2rem;">Read</span>
      </a>
      <a href="/blog/open-source-infrastructure-smbs.html" style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; padding: 1.5rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06); text-decoration:none; color:inherit;">
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:600;">Open-Source Infrastructure for SMBs</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.82rem; color:#86868b; margin-top:0.15rem;">March 20, 2026</div>
        </div>
        <span class="m-lk" style="flex-shrink:0; margin-left:2rem;">Read</span>
      </a>
      <a href="/blog/cyber-security-best-practices.html" style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; padding: 1.5rem 0; text-decoration:none; color:inherit;">
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:600;">Cybersecurity Best Practices</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.82rem; color:#86868b; margin-top:0.15rem;">April 1, 2025</div>
        </div>
        <span class="m-lk" style="flex-shrink:0; margin-left:2rem;">Read</span>
      </a>
    </div>
    <div style="text-align:center; margin-top:2rem;"><a href="/blog.html" class="m-lk">All posts</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta" style="background: #000; color: #fff; padding: 10rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d" style="background: #81BD4A;"></div>
    <h2 style="color: #fff;">Ready to take control<br>of your infrastructure?</h2>
    <p style="color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);">30 minutes. No pitch. Just an honest look at what you need and how we can help.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="hp-btn">Book your free consultation</a>
    <div class="m-sm" style="color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35);">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill" style="color:#81BD4A;"></i> Free &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill" style="color:#81BD4A;"></i> 30 min &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill" style="color:#81BD4A;"></i> No commitment
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
